title: Senior Software Engineer - Grofers Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Grofers Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers Advisory Limited family as a Senior Software Engineer in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
